Button.tooltip: Open in Bridge Asset National Collection (BANC/AustRoads)
Open in SAP S/4HANA Asset Management
Create a new AS 5100 inspection order for this bridge
Log a structural defect on this bridge
Add a load, height, width, or speed restriction
Permanently close this bridge. Full audit trail recorded.
Lift the closure and reopen this bridge.

Text.text: No AS 5100.7 capacity assessment has been completed for this bridge. Capacity must be assessed by a qualified engineer (NER/CPEng) before permits can be issued.

Table.noDataText: No active permits for this bridge

MessageStrip.text: Custom attributes extend bridge data with organisation-specific fields. Attributes marked Mandatory must have a value. Data types: TEXT = free text, NUMBER = numeric, BOOLEAN = Yes/No, DATE = calendar date. Attributes are managed in Admin Config → Attributes.

Table.noDataText: No custom attributes recorded for this bridge. Attributes are configured in Admin Config → Attributes & Lookups.

core:Icon.tooltip: The name/label of the custom attribute as configured in Admin Config.
The recorded value for this attribute on this specific bridge.
Mandatory attributes must have a value recorded. Missing mandatory values may affect compliance reporting.
TEXT: free text • NUMBER: numeric • BOOLEAN: Yes/No • DATE: calendar date

ObjectStatus.tooltip: {= ${detail>mandatory} ? 'This attribute is mandatory and must be recorded.' : 'This attribute is optional.'}
{= ${detail>dataType} === 'TEXT' ? 'Free text value' : ${detail>dataType} === 'NUMBER' ? 'Numeric value' : ${detail>dataType} === 'BOOLEAN' ? 'Yes or No value' : 'Date value'}

Text.text: BANC, Road Authority and Open Data cross-references

Button.tooltip: Record a new formal AS 5100 bridge inspection

Table.noDataText: No events recorded for this bridge

Panel.headerText: Risk Matrix — AustRoads BIMM §7 (click a cell to manually set risk)

MessageStrip.text: Formula: Risk Score = Flood Exposure (1–5) × Foundation Susceptibility (1–5) = 1–25. Bands: 1–4 = LOW · 5–9 = MEDIUM · 10–16 = HIGH · 17–25 = CRITICAL. Flood Exposure accounts for flood frequency (ARI), flow velocity and channel morphology. Foundation Susceptibility accounts for foundation type, scour depth observed and mitigation measures.

Select.tooltip: Manually set the scour risk level overriding the calculated value

Button.tooltip: Save the manually selected risk level to this bridge record

Table.noDataText: No characteristics loaded — sync to S/4HANA first
No documents attached to this bridge

Input.placeholder: e.g. Total station survey, LiDAR scan
e.g. Bottom flange weld at midspan pier 2

TextArea.placeholder: Describe the work done or reason for closure...

Label.tooltip: The category of restriction applied to this bridge (e.g. Height, Mass, Speed).
The numeric restriction limit (e.g. 4.5 for 4.5 m height clearance).
Unit of measure: m = metres, t = tonnes, km/h = speed.
ACTIVE = currently enforced. SCHEDULED = future restriction not yet in force.
Date from which this restriction takes effect.
Expiry date. Leave blank for an ongoing/indefinite restriction.
BOTH = applies in both directions. INCREASING/DECREASING = chainage direction.
Official gazette notification number (e.g. NSW Gaz 2024/123).
Mandatory: explain why this restriction is temporary (e.g. flood damage, maintenance works).

TextArea.placeholder: e.g. Emergency flood damage — structural assessment pending…

Label.tooltip: Name or reference of the approving authority.

CheckBox.text: Permit Required — vehicles need NHVR permit to use this route
CheckBox.tooltip: If checked, NHVR operators must obtain a permit before using this bridge under this restriction.
Physical signage must be erected at the bridge location.

TextArea.placeholder: Additional context, engineering notes, gazette details…
e.g. Engineering review completed, restriction no longer required…
e.g. Temporary suspension lifted, re-activating restriction…

MessageStrip.text: This will set the bridge posting status to CLOSED and log a closure event.

TextArea.placeholder: e.g. Structural defect identified, emergency inspection required…

MessageStrip.text: This will reopen the bridge. If active restrictions exist, status will be set to POSTED.

TextArea.placeholder: e.g. Repairs completed, structural assessment passed…

MessageStrip.text: Record a formal condition assessment. This will update the bridge condition rating and log an event.
Record a formal AS 5100 bridge inspection. This creates an audit record and updates the bridge's Last Inspection Date.

Input.placeholder: e.g. No scour observed / Undermining at pier 2

TextArea.placeholder: Key observations, recommendations, follow-up actions required…
